summary: Iteration 270: Pipeline Error Handling - Backend 16/16 tests passed. Frontend error handling code verified working. Client-side validation (title <3 chars, story <50 chars) with inline hints working. Backend returns proper HTTP status codes (401/402/422/500) with detailed error messages. Action links ('Go to Login', 'Get More Credits') implemented in form-error component.

issues: Cookie consent banner overlays content initially - obscures Generate button until dismissed

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/pipeline/create without auth returns 401 with 'Not authenticated' detail
VERIFIED: POST /api/pipeline/create with short title (2 chars) returns 422 with Pydantic validation error array
VERIFIED: POST /api/pipeline/create with short story (<50 chars) returns 422 with field-specific error
VERIFIED: POST /api/pipeline/create with valid input returns 200 with job_id and credits_charged
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/options returns animation_styles, age_groups, voice_presets arrays
VERIFIED: GET /api/pipeline/rate-limit-status for exempt user shows can_create=true, exempt=true
VERIFIED: Frontend handleGenerate() has client-side validation for empty title, short title (<3), short story (<50)
VERIFIED: Frontend catch block handles 401 (session), 402 (credits), 422 (validation), 500 (server error)
VERIFIED: Frontend form-error component has data-testid='form-error' and shows action links
VERIFIED: 'Go to Login' link appears when error mentions 'session'
VERIFIED: 'Get More Credits' link appears when error mentions 'credit'
VERIFIED: Character counter shows real-time '(need X more)' hint for short stories
VERIFIED: Inline hint 'Title needs at least 3 characters' shows for short titles

BACKEND_401_AUTH_ERROR.condition: No auth token or invalid token

response.detail: Array of {loc, msg, type} Pydantic errors

BACKEND_402_CREDITS_ERROR.condition: ValueError with 'credit' in message from create_pipeline_job

validations: Empty title: 'Please enter a title for your video.'
Short title (<3): 'Title must be at least 3 characters.'
Long title (>100): 'Title must be 100 characters or less.'
Empty story: 'Please enter a story to generate a video from.'
Short story (<50): 'Story must be at least 50 characters. You have X — need Y more.'

FRONTEND_ERROR_DISPLAY.styling: bg-red-500/10 border border-red-500/30 with AlertCircle icon

handlers.no_response: Network error: Could not reach the server...
handlers.422: Parses Pydantic array to field-specific messages
handlers.429: Rate limit message + refreshes rate limit status
handlers.401: 'Your session has expired. Please log in again.'
handlers.500: Server error message or 'Server error occurred...'

CHARACTER_COUNTER.display: X / 10,000 characters (need Y more) in amber when < 50

INLINE_HINTS.title_hint: 'Title needs at least 3 characters' shown when title.length > 0 && < 3

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 270: Verified improved error handling for Story Video creation. Backend returns proper HTTP status codes (401/402/422/500) with detailed messages. Frontend has comprehensive client-side validation and handles all backend error types with specific messages and action links. The form-error component (data-testid='form-error') shows 'Go to Login' for session errors and 'Get More Credits' for credit errors. Character counter provides real-time feedback for story length. All 16 backend tests passed. The test user (test@visionary-suite.com) is rate-limit-exempt so won't trigger 429 errors.

rca_of_the_issue.original_issue: User reported generic 'An error occurred while creating the video. Please try again.' error
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Backend was not returning specific HTTP status codes and frontend was not parsing error details correctly

backend: Added 402 status for credit errors (ValueError with 'credit' in message)
Added 500 status with first 200 chars of error detail for unexpected exceptions
Added exc_info=True logging for debugging server errors
frontend: Added Pydantic validation array parsing (maps {loc, msg} to field-specific messages)
Added specific handlers for 401/402/422/429/500 status codes
Added network error detection (when e.response is undefined)
Added action links: 'Go to Login' for session errors, 'Get More Credits' for credit errors

rca_of_the_issue.verification: All error scenarios now return specific, actionable messages instead of generic errors
